mainEntity.name: Deadline to settle workers comp case in Holladay Utah?
mainEntity.text: Deadline to settle workers comp case in Holladay Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: No strict deadline but settle before final order or within 6 years for reopening.[13]

suggestedAnswer.text: Holladay claims best settled post-MMI with full impairment rating. Rush settlements undervalue future care—wait for clear prognosis. Attorney negotiates lump sum vs ongoing; tax-free but Medicare liens possible.[13]

name: When to Settle Workers Comp Holladay
description: No strict deadline but settle before final order or within 6 years for reopening.[13]
